summary: Backend engineer with 4 years building APIs and data services in Python. Interested in product-minded teams and clean system design.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Designed and shipped REST APIs used by 50k weekly active users; reduced p95 latency by 28% after query and caching improvements.
Led migration of a monolithic reporting module to async workers (Celery + Redis), improving reliability during peak load.
Mentored two junior developers through code reviews and pair programming on testing practices.

experience.title: Junior Developer
highlights: Built internal admin tools in Django and PostgreSQL; added automated backup verification scripts.

projects.name: OpenSource CLI Toolkit
projects.description: Small Python CLI for parsing résumé JSON and linting section headings; 120+ GitHub stars.
